basic_details.job_title: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital – Senior Resident – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 4 Senior Resident posts such as Senior Resident Ophthalmology - 2 vacancies and Senior Resident Orthopedics - 2 vacancies for eligible postgraduate medical candidates, with the walk-in application process open on 03 June 2026 on the official website dduh.delhi.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MS/MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Ophthalmology, Post Graduate Degree (MS/DNB) in Orthopedics

seo_tags: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
